name: Patient 24
history: Past pressure related to performance and social interactions. Presents confident front while hiding vulnerability. Recent business failure with financial hardship.
intermediate_belief: I have to appear successful even when I'm failing.
intermediate_belief_depression: My business failure proves I'm a fraud.
coping_strategies: Maintaining confident facade, hiding financial struggles.
situation: Invited to visit sister while dealing with financial instability.
auto_thought: My sister will see through my facade and know I'm struggling.
behavior: Consider sister's visit invitation while hiding financial reality.
